title: fix: correct app attributions and remove broken entries
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tidying the app garden
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the community app showcase to make sure every creator gets the right credit for their hard work. Broken links have been pruned, and attributions are blooming beautifully.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community apps showcase by removing broken entries and correcting author attributions for several projects.
gist.impact: Community developers will now see their apps correctly credited in the showcase, and users won't encounter broken links.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a curator in a cozy art gallery or garden, adjusting nameplates on different displays (representing the apps) to ensure the right creators get credit. The monitor robot assists by handing her the correct tags.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny curator's beret, carefully adjusting nameplates on a display of glowing code-plants. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily hands her a new name tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny curator's beret, carefully adjusting nameplates on a display of glowing code-plants. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily hands her a new name tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
